caption: A man wearing a large, silver-grey, textured wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, appearing to speak as his facial expression shifts slightly across the sequence. The background consists of a wall covered in numerous framed photographs and a shelving unit with folded clothing. On-screen text includes a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and a partially obscured logo on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". The scene remains static in terms of location and equipment, with only the man's subtle mouth movements and head position changing as he speaks during the short clip.
